chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Boundaries of Mina, Arafat, and Muzdalifah

text: 2979 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «حَدُّ عَرَفَةَ مِنْ بَطْنِ عُرَنَةَ وَ ثَوِيَّةَ وَ نَمِرَةَ وَ ذِي اَلْمَجَازِ وَ خَلْفَ اَلْجَبَلِ مَوْقِفٌ إِلَى وَرَاءِ اَلْجَبَلِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2979 - Imam (as) said:
"The boundary of Arafat includes the Valley of 'Uranah, Thuwiyyah, Namirah, and Dhi al-Majaz, and extends behind the mountain to its rear."
